arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Fulham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea welcome West London neighbours Fulham to Stamford Bridge on Boxing Day. Both teams will be aiming to bounce back from frustrating goalless draws last weekend, after being held by Everton and Southampton respectively. Chelsea sit second in the table, four points behind leaders Liverpool, heading into the December 26th schedule. arts.ttl: Chelsea are two games away from Cole Palmer and Levi Colwill nightmare as seven stars warned
arts.sum: So far, Chelsea have played 17 games, with Palmer and Colwill picking up three yellow cards each. That means, should any one of Palmer, Colwill, Caicedo, Lavia or Madueke pick up a yellow card against both Fulham and Ipswich, they will be suspended for the clash at Crystal Palace on January 4.
